---
title: "Relationship between BBB permeability and cognition for paper"
author: "Azadeh"
format: html
editor: visual
---



```{r chunk-003}
library(erikmisc)
library(tidyverse)
library(labelled)
library(corrplot)
library(broom)
# install.packages("dunn.test")
library(dunn.test)
library(ggpubr)
# devtools::install_github("vincentarelbundock/modelsummary")
# install.packages("modelsummary")
library(modelsummary)
# remotes::install_github("erikerhardt/erikmisc")  # install once if needed

#dir.create("out_new", showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r}

load("dat_sub_Data_inflammation_analysis_paper_06052025.RData"
     )
load("dat_sub_and_Var_for_inflammation_analysis.RData")

```

# make this code simpler i can use anova

```{r}
# ---- packages ----
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(broom)

# data for demographics, before z-score scaling
dat_sheet_demo <-
  #dat_sheet
  dat_sub

dat_sheet <-
  #dat_sheet %>%
  dat_sub %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    # to allow log transformation when wmhv==0
  #  percent_wmhv  = percent_wmhv + 0.00001
  #  fl_cyto_csf_il_4 = ifelse(fl_cyto_csf_il_4 == 0.001, NA, fl_cyto_csf_il_4)
  #  across(tidyselect::all_of(c(Var$csf, Var$plasma, Var$mri)), e_log_shift, min_add = 1, base_log = 2)
    across(tidyselect::all_of(c(Var$csf, Var$plasma, Var$mri)), scale)
  , across(tidyselect::all_of(c(Var$csf, Var$plasma, Var$mri)), as.numeric)
  )

# ---- settings ----
responses  <- c("npsy_executive_t","npsy_attention_t","npsy_memory_t","npsy_language_t")
predictors <- c("fl_albumin_index_log2","mri_perm_3t_tot_log2")

# p-value -> significance stars
star <- function(p) symnum(p, corr = FALSE, na = FALSE,
                           cutpoints = c(0, .001, .01, .05, .1, 1),
                           symbols   = c("***","**","*","."," "))

# ŌöĆŌöĆ Friendly short labels for axes ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ
resp_labels <- c(
  "npsy_executive_t"  = "Executive Function\n(T-Score)",
  "npsy_attention_t"  = "Attention\n(T-Score)",
  "npsy_memory_t"     = "Memory\n(T-Score)",
  "npsy_language_t"   = "Language\n(T-Score)"
)
pred_labels <- c(
  "fl_albumin_index_log2"  = "Albumin Index (log2)",
  "mri_perm_3t_tot_log2"   = "3T Permeability (log2)"
)

# ---- fit all 8 models -------------------------------------------------------
results <-
  tidyr::crossing(resp = responses, pred = predictors) |>
  mutate(
    formula = map2(resp, pred, ~ reformulate(.y, response = .x)),
    fit     = map(formula, ~ lm(.x, data = dat_sheet_demo)),
    fc      = map2(fit, pred, ~ erikmisc::e_plot_model_contrasts(
                 fit               = .x,
                 dat_cont          = dat_sheet_demo,
                 choose_contrasts  = .y,
                 sw_print          = FALSE,
                 sw_table_in_plot  = FALSE,   # ŌåÉ removes caption clutter
                 sw_TWI_plots_keep = "singles",
                 adjust_method     = "none"
               )),
    plot   = map2(fc, pred, ~ .x$plots[[.y]]),
    interp = map2(fc, pred, ~ .x$interp[[.y]])
  )

# ---- coefficient table ------------------------------------------------------
coef_table_all <-
  results |>
  mutate(coef_row = map2(fit, pred, ~ broom::tidy(.x) |>
                           filter(term == .y) |>
                           transmute(term, estimate, std.error,
                                     statistic, p.value,
                                     sig = as.character(star(p.value))))) |>
  select(response = resp, predictor = pred, coef_row) |>
  unnest(coef_row) |>
  arrange(response, predictor)

# ---- build plots ------------------------------------------------------------
plots_named <- setNames(results$plot, paste(results$resp, "~", results$pred))

journal_theme <- ggplot2::theme(
  plot.title   = ggplot2::element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
  axis.title.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10),
  axis.title.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10),
  axis.text    = ggplot2::element_text(size = 9),
  plot.caption = ggplot2::element_blank(),              # ŌåÉ hide caption entirely
  plot.margin  = ggplot2::margin(t = 22, r = 5, b = 5, l = 5, unit = "pt")
)

# Apply theme + replace long axis labels with short ones
plots_named <- imap(plots_named, function(p, nm) {
  # extract resp and pred from name "resp ~ pred"
  parts     <- stringr::str_split(nm, " ~ ")[[1]]
  resp_name <- parts[1]
  pred_name <- parts[2]

  p +
    journal_theme +
    ggplot2::labs(
      x = pred_labels[pred_name],
      y = resp_labels[resp_name]
    )
})

# ---- arrange 4├Ś2 grid -------------------------------------------------------
plot_order <- c(
  "npsy_executive_t ~ fl_albumin_index_log2",
  "npsy_executive_t ~ mri_perm_3t_tot_log2",
  "npsy_attention_t ~ fl_albumin_index_log2",
  "npsy_attention_t ~ mri_perm_3t_tot_log2",
  "npsy_memory_t ~ fl_albumin_index_log2",
  "npsy_memory_t ~ mri_perm_3t_tot_log2",
  "npsy_language_t ~ fl_albumin_index_log2",
  "npsy_language_t ~ mri_perm_3t_tot_log2"
)

ncol_cog <- 2
nrow_cog <- 4
w_cog    <- ncol_cog * PANEL_IN   # 9 in
h_cog    <- nrow_cog * PANEL_IN   # 18 in

combined_plot_cognition <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  plotlist       = plots_named[plot_order],
  labels         = "AUTO",
  label_size     = 14,
  label_fontface = "bold",
  label_x        = 0.02,
  label_y        = 0.995,
  ncol           = ncol_cog,
  nrow           = nrow_cog,
  align          = "hv",
  axis           = "tblr"
)

ggsave(
  file.path("All_figures_for_paper", "plot_cognition_BBB.png"),
  plot   = combined_plot_cognition,
  width  = w_cog,
  height = h_cog,
  dpi    = 300,
  bg     = "white"
)

message("Saved: plot_cognition_BBB.png | 8 panels | ", w_cog, "x", h_cog, " in")


  
```
